title: Bitcoin reclaims $68k as ETF inflows resume
summary: Spot ETF net inflows turned positive for the week, coinciding with a reclaim of the $68,000 level.

title: BlackRock spot BTC ETF logs record daily inflow
summary: BlackRock's spot Bitcoin ETF recorded its largest single-day inflow of the quarter, extending the week's positive flow trend.

title: Whale moves 12,000 ETH to exchange
summary: An address tagged as a long-term holder transferred 12,000 ETH to a major exchange, a potential supply signal.
